blocks.text: I'll try to pull that budget file and see what access I have.

I can't help with this one — I don't have access to the finance budget doc.

When I tried to read `teams/finance/budget.md`, I got a `PermissionError: [Errno 13] Permission denied`. That file is restricted to the finance group, and I'm not in it. The Q1 headcount spend figure lives in that doc, so I don't have another source to pull it from.

A couple of suggestions for unblocking your deck:
- Ask someone in finance (e.g., whoever owns the budget doc) to share the figure directly, or
- Have them grant you access to the file if you'll need it recurring, or
- If you already have access yourself, open the doc and grab the number from there — I just can't do it on your behalf under my current permissions.

I'd rather flag this than guess a number for a deck — a fabricated figure in a finance slide is the kind of thing that goes badly.
